news.t: Best Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETFs for Q1 2021

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Long Term Corporate Bond ETF (SPLB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Corporate - Long index. The fund tracks an index of investment-grade, fixed-rate, taxable US corporate bonds with a remaining maturity of at least 10 years. SPLB was launched on Mar 10, 2009 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Best Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best investment grade corporate bond ETFs for Q1 2021 are SPLB, IGLB, and VCLT.
